tagline: Your smart way to learn driving

landing.badge: Your smart way to learn driving
landing.heroSubtitle: Master traffic laws, road signs, and driving safety through interactive lessons, AI-powered explanations, and exam-ready practice quizzes.
landing.featuresSubheading: A complete learning platform designed to get you road-ready
landing.feature1Desc: 5 chapters covering traffic laws, road signs, vehicle safety, and defensive driving with progressive difficulty.
landing.feature2Desc: 100+ questions modeled after the real exam. Take chapter quizzes or full exam simulations.
landing.feature3Desc: A Gemini-powered tutor that knows your progress and answers driving-related questions instantly.
landing.feature4Desc: See exactly where you stand with detailed per-chapter progress, quiz scores, and overall readiness.
landing.stepsSubheading: Three simple steps to your driving license
landing.step1Desc: Sign up in seconds. No credit card required, completely free to use.
landing.step2Desc: Study lessons at your pace, quiz yourself, and ask the AI when you're stuck.
landing.step3Desc: Walk into your driving test with confidence and pass on your first try.
landing.ctaSectionSubtitle: Join DriveWise and start your journey to becoming a confident driver.
landing.heroChip: Aligned with the official theory exam
landing.f1Desc: Bite-sized chapters with images, video, and key takeaways.
landing.f2Desc: Practice by chapter with instant feedback and explanations.
landing.f3Desc: 60 questions, 60 minutes — the real test, in your browser.
landing.f4Desc: Track weak spots and know when you're test-ready.
landing.f5Desc: An AI tutor that breaks down every wrong answer.
landing.f6Desc: Switch instantly. Native RTL layout, not a flipped UI.
landing.ctaSub: Create your account in under a minute and jump into your first lesson.

assistant.welcomeSubtitle: I'm here to help you master driving. Ask about traffic signs, road rules, exam tips, or anything driving-related.
assistant.emptyConversation: This chat is empty. Send a message, image, or PDF to begin.
assistant.disclaimer: DriveWise AI can make mistakes. Verify important information.
assistant.suggested2: Give me a driving test quiz
assistant.emptyHelper: Pick a suggestion to start, or just type a question.

footer: Your smart way to learn driving

auth.continueJourney: Continue your journey to becoming a confident, safe driver. Your progress is waiting for you.
auth.aiExplains: AI explains every mistake you make
auth.joinThousands: Join thousands of learners mastering the rules of the road with DriveWise.
auth.mockExams: Mock exams to test your knowledge
auth.pwdMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.termsNotice: By registering you agree to our terms of service.

home.subtitle: Your driving learning dashboard. Continue your journey to becoming a confident, safe driver.
home.startLearningDesc: Begin your lessons on traffic rules and signs.
home.practiceQuizzesDesc: Test your knowledge with exam-style questions.
home.viewProgressDesc: Check your readiness for the real driving test.
home.askAiTutorDesc: Get immediate answers to your driving questions.
home.adminDashboardDesc: Manage users, lessons, and system content.
home.takeQuizDesc: Test your knowledge with interactive quizzes.
home.trackJourneyDesc: Track your learning journey and achievements.
home.examSimulationDesc: Practice with a real exam-style test
home.heroSub: You're {n} chapters from exam-ready. Let's keep going.
home.continueLearningSub: Pick up where you left off
home.noActivity: Your recent activity will show here.

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.subtitle: Master driving theory through structured chapters and sub-lessons.
lessons.practiceHint: Test what you've learned in this chapter.
lessons.lessonCompletedHint: You've finished this chapter. Choose what to do next.
lessons.bookmarksEmpty: No bookmarks yet. Use the bookmark button on any lesson to save it.

quiz.title: Quizzes
quiz.subtitle: Test your driving knowledge with chapter quizzes or a full exam simulation.
quiz.examSimulationDesc: 60 random questions from all chapters. Answers are hidden until submission, just like the real exam!
quiz.tip1: Review the lesson material before taking a quiz
quiz.tip2: Read each question carefully before answering
quiz.tip3: Use the AI Assistant if you need help understanding a concept
quiz.tip4: Retake quizzes to improve your score
quiz.question: Question
quiz.endExamConfirm: End the exam now? Only questions you have answered will be scored.
quiz.examMustAnswer: Select an answer to continue, or use Skip.
quiz.noGoBack: You can't go back to previous questions
quiz.examIntroSub: A full mock of the theory test — score 51 out of 60 to pass.
quiz.examInstr4: Up to 9 wrong answers — early failure beyond that
quiz.examInstr6: You can skip up to 4 questions — skipped questions return at the end of the exam and are not counted until you answer them
quiz.examInstr7: You cannot move to the next question without selecting an answer, except by using Skip
quiz.examReady: You're ready for the real thing.
quiz.examReview: Review your weak chapters and try again.
quiz.bookmarksEmpty: You haven't saved any questions in this chapter yet.
quiz.bookmarksEmptyHint: Save a question with the bookmark icon to find it here.

progress.title: Your Progress
progress.subtitle: Track your learning journey and quiz performance.
progress.resetDescription: This will clear all your completed lessons, quiz results, and overall progress. This action cannot be undone.
progress.subtitle30d: Your last 30 days at a glance.
progress.noExamHistory: No exam attempts yet — finish your first exam to see results here.
progress.noWeakest: No weak chapters yet — keep going!
